phasePlan.purpose: June 1 Green Goods public demo for two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults, followed by reusable skill planning after demo validation.

phases.name: Scope/plan lock + Linear sync
exitCriteria: brief/spec/plan/eval/status align on Wallet Endow + Thirdweb Card Endow demo scope
Donate and Card Donate remain deferred
Linear issues PRD-435, PRD-436, PRD-440, PRD-442, PRD-443, PRD-444, PRD-487, and PRD-569 through PRD-573 carry the corrected tracking note

phases.name: Wallet Endow public demo path
exitCriteria: Shareable public /fund demo path presents the two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults
Wallet Endow deposits to the connected wallet receiver for both vaults
Receipt/success path returns to /fund?manage=endowments

phases.name: Thirdweb Card Endow demo path
exitCriteria: Thirdweb Card Endow checkout is wired for the same two vaults
Card Endow uses a recovered user wallet receiverAddress
No provider-owned custody path can receive vault shares

phases.name: Ownership/share verification gate
exitCriteria: Vault shares are verified for the user/recovered wallet
share_verification proof is recorded or the owner-scoped deposit read proves the same postcondition
Card Endow remains hidden until this gate passes

phases.name: Public Manage Endowments / withdrawal proof
exitCriteria: /fund?manage=endowments shows owned wallet and card-funded endowment positions
Withdrawal proof succeeds for the owning wallet/account
Management URL contains no receipt tokens, wallet addresses, emails, or provider identifiers

phases.name: Demo QA pass
exitCriteria: Desktop and mobile browser proof covers final public /fund demo
Wallet Endow, Thirdweb Card Endow, ownership/share proof, Manage Endowments, Donate absence, and privacy are verified
Targeted shared/client/agent tests pass or blockers are recorded

phases.name: Reusable skill planning handoff after demo validation
exitCriteria: Green Goods demo validation is complete
Reusable skill starts with frontend UI for existing Ethereum Octant vaults using standard RPC plus wallet connection
Advanced backend/API modules cover Thirdweb-first card providers, future Stripe/Coinbase adapters, and optional create-vault via Octant factory/API path

planMetadata: node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs linear-sync --feature public-endowment-withdrawal-recovery --json returns zero warnings
node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs validate may remain blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability hub schema drift unless that drift is fixed

shared: existing-vault manifest and receiver typing selected for the demo path
safe max-loss preview parity with withdraw mutation
Card Endow proof-key separation and required receiver semantics
client: Max, confirm, failure, success refresh, receipt CTA, and no admin controls
sprint visibility: Wallet Endow and Manage Endowments visible, Donate absent, Card Endow hidden until proof, Card Donate proof never reveals Card Endow
browser: final public /fund demo proof required on desktop and mobile

notes: Promoted to active on 2026-05-10; scope locked on 2026-05-31 to the NYC vault/endow sprint.
June 1 Green Goods demo is a shareable public /fund link for two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults with Wallet Endow and Thirdweb Card Endow.
Public withdrawal is the first implementation slice; do not let deferred Donate recovery block the /fund management fix.
Wallet Endow remains visible while the public /fund management panel is built.
Public Donate and Card Donate are deferred to separate future non-Cookie-Jar scope; do not expose Donate on /fund for this sprint.
Thirdweb Card Endow is sprint-critical for the demo, but remains hidden until recovered-wallet ownership, vault-share verification, public visibility, and successful withdrawal proof pass.
Card Endow vault shares must belong to the user/recovered wallet, not a provider-owned account.
Funding lane matrix is explicit: Wallet Endow remains wallet-owned; Manage Endowments is public account-gated; Donate is deferred; Card Endow is ownership/share/withdrawal-gated.
Low-level Cookie Jar hooks/contracts are preserved in this pass; only the public /fund sprint surface hides Donate.
Provider proof entries must be exact by intent, Garden destination, token, chain, and method; Card Donate proof never unlocks Card Endow.
/fund?manage=endowments must not carry receipt tokens, wallet addresses, emails, or provider identifiers.
Endowment management deeplink is /fund?manage=endowments.
Public withdraw preview must use the same 1% max-loss default as the withdraw mutation.
No existing-position migration, public address lookup, fiat off-ramp, contract work, or indexer schema work is planned.

Local validation on 2026-05-31 passed git diff whitespace check, JSON parsing, lint:vocab, and check:design-tokens; package tests, check:design-generated, and ci-local remain blocked in this worktree because dependencies are not installed.
Reusable vault crowdfunding UI skill work is tracked from this hub as related planning metadata after Green Goods demo validation, not as a new active automation lane.
Green Goods / NYC vaults are the first reusable-skill fixture; the future skill must remain portable for Octant and other public-goods vault communities and must not hardcode NYC as the default.
The simplest reusable skill output is frontend UI for existing Ethereum Octant vaults using standard RPC plus wallet connection.

Advanced reusable-skill modules are backend/API concerns: Thirdweb-first card providers, future Stripe/Coinbase adapters, optional create-vault via Octant factory/API path, secrets, provider setup, webhook verification, receipt policy, and redacted logs.
Skill tracking parent PRD-569 and children PRD-570 through PRD-573 cover inputs, DesignMD fixture/template, wallet-first vault runtime, and provider/create-vault extension boundaries.

Skill tracking validation on 2026-05-31 passed status JSON parse, public-endowment linear-sync manifest with zero warnings, and Linear read-back; full plan-hub validate is blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability schema drift.
Check-in gates are required after phases 2, 3, 5, and 6.
status.json is authoritative; branch names are automation signals.
.plans/ is the durable repo truth; any tool-local or .claude/agent-memory surface stays environment-local until freshness and ownership rules exist.

ui.handoff_note: Implement and verify the public /fund demo for two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults: Wallet Endow, My Endowments, /fund?manage=endowments, Donate absent, and Thirdweb Card Endow exposure only after recovered-wallet custody/share/withdrawal proof. Add i18n.

state_api.handoff_note: Own shared public endowment-position data, existing-vault/receiver typing for the two-vault demo path, safe max-loss preview parity, public withdraw reuse boundaries, exact provider-proof separation, and Thirdweb Card Endow receiver-address/share-verification gates. Donate is deferred out of this sprint.

contracts.handoff_note: No Solidity, deployment, or indexer schema work is planned for this recovery hub.

tdd.note: The plan uses existing vault deposit reads and withdrawal mechanics; no contract lane is planned.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Review the final public /fund demo for the two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults: Wallet Endow, Thirdweb Card Endow custody/share proof, account-gated visibility, /fund?manage=endowments receipt return path, mobile layout, i18n, Donate absence, and Card Endow hidden-until-proof behavior.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run targeted shared/client/agent validation, inspect Thirdweb provider proof and recovered-owner share gates, require browser proof for the final public /fund demo, and confirm no unrelated funding/PWA/admin work was pulled in.

history.note: Recorded the public endowment withdrawal recovery plan, card Donate recovery lane, Card Endow gate, and no-contract boundary.
Deep review tightened public management deeplink, safe withdraw preview parity, Thirdweb webhook/current-docs requirement, and Card Endow receiver-address gate.
Second deep audit tightened funding lane matrix, Card Donate Cookie Jar proof, exact provider-proof scope, Card Endow share verification, receipt privacy, and stale docs/design truth targets.
Moved feature hub from backlog to active
Updated Markdown plan truth after active promotion and verified Linear sync manifest has no warnings.
Locked NYC sprint to Wallet Endow, public Manage Endowments, and hidden-gated Card Endow; deferred Donate to separate future non-Cookie-Jar scope.
Passed diff whitespace, JSON parse, lint:vocab, and check:design-tokens; package tests and ci-local blocked by missing node_modules/vitest/js-yaml/tool binaries.
Recorded reusable vault crowdfunding UI skill tracking in local plan metadata and Linear parent/child issues PRD-569 through PRD-573.

Status JSON parsed, public-endowment linear-sync manifest returned zero warnings, and Linear read-back confirmed PRD-569 children and PRD-435/PRD-487 comments. Full plan-hub validate remains blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability hub schema drift.

Locked corrected implementation sequence: Wallet Endow and Thirdweb Card Endow for two deployed NYC Ethereum Octant vaults, check-ins after phases 2/3/5/6, Donate/Card Donate deferred, reusable skill planning after demo validation.
Commented PRD-435, PRD-436, PRD-440, PRD-442, PRD-443, PRD-444, PRD-487, and PRD-569 through PRD-573 with the corrected June 1 demo, check-in, validation, and reusable-skill boundaries.
